title: Sanwiwood
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sanwiwood''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Tree/Legends|tree]] that was native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]], growing on the [[Niruu Plateau]]. The [[Niruu]] tribe of [[Alwari]] made highly-prized sculptures out of sanwiwood.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]

{{Interlang
|de=Sanwi
}}
